历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings were approximately 5118, 8842, 9881, 8095, and 9138 respectively. Rankings shifted significantly backward from 2021 to 2023 (from 5118 to 9881), rebounded to 8095 in 2024, and fell again to 9138 in 2025, showing overall large fluctuations, with a recent three-year center around 9000–9900. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 9138. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category (formerly Science) in Jilin Province: 13 in 2021, 17 in 2022, 15 in 2023, 17 in both 2024 and 2025, and still 17 in 2026, remaining flat for three consecutive years with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: South China Normal University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. Its main ranking on the Soft Science Ranking has been stable around 79–80 in recent years, placing it at the upper-middle level among normal universities nationwide. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed, with no major public opinion shocks. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 70th (rated as average), showing no signs of increased application attention. In recent years, there have been no records of admission score line breaks or sharp drops. It has A+ in Psychology, A in Marxist Theory, A- in Physical Education, and A- in Education. The majors enrolled in Physics Category (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Physics, Biological Sciences, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, Network Engineering) have a moderate correlation with the university's advantageous disciplines, with Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (Teacher Training) benefiting from the A- Education discipline support.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity index for teacher training/education majors in 2024 was 55.84 (differentiated wait-and-see), showing a slight cooling compared to 2023. Computer-related majors are recommended, and electronic information/communication majors are highly recommended, related to the Network Engineering major direction. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Jilin Province is approximately 80,038 (estimated at 72.2% of total), a slight decrease of about 0.5% from 2025 (80,421), indicating slightly eased competition. South China Normal University is located in Guangzhou City, Guangdong Province, and is a cross-province enrollment. Its enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jilin Province is about 17, with no significant changes in recent years, and the influence of regional preference factors is limited.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the large fluctuations in rankings from 2021 to 2025 but a recent two-year center around 9000–9200, the flat enrollment plan for 2026, a slight decrease in Physics Category examinees (slightly eased competition), stable university reputation, and differentiated wait-and-see popularity for teacher training majors, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will shift slightly backward from the 2025 ranking of 9138. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 9158, with a range of 8700–9650.

- Physics (Teacher Training).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 8700–9650, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering as the main target, Tier 1 Mathematics and Applied Mathematics as a reach, and Tier 3 Network Engineering as a safety. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<8700), prioritize Tier 1 teacher training majors. For rankings near the upper limit (>9650), it is recommended to mainly consider Tier 3.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings were approximately 1287, 1321, 1282, 1685, and 1769 respectively. From 2021 to 2023, they were basically stable between 1282 and 1321, but jumped to 1685 in 2024 and further shifted to 1769 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 487 positions over the past two years, showing a clear backward trend. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 1769. The university's enrollment plan for History Category (formerly Liberal Arts) in Jilin Province: 14 students in 2021, 17 students from 2022 to 2025, and still 17 students in 2026, remaining unchanged for five consecutive years, with no expansion or contraction, thus having no direct impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: South China Normal University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its main ranking on the Soft Science Ranking: 75th in 2021, 78th in 2022, 79th in 2023, 79th in 2024, 80th in 2025, and 79th in 2026, stable around 79th to 80th in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of national normal universities. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed, involving only a film controversy related to the university's director, with no major positive or negative public opinion impact. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 70th (rated as average), with short video exposure at a medium-low level, showing no obvious signal of increased application attention. In recent years, there have been no records of sudden drops or crashes in admission cutoffs, so the application psychology is relatively stable. Psychology is A+ (top discipline), Marxist Theory is A, Physical Education is A-, and Education is A-, totaling four disciplines at A- or above. Psychology is at the national top level, strongly attracting related majors (such as normal and psychology categories).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity index for normal/education majors in 2024 was 55.84 (differentiated wait-and-see), slightly cooling compared to 2023 (63.81). Law is recommended, and Chinese Language and Literature is recommended, both being enrollment directions for the History Category at this university. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Jilin Province is about 110,868, with an estimated 30,830 in the History Category based on the recent proportion of about 27.8%, a slight decrease of about 0.8% from 2025 (31,071), indicating a slight easing of competition. South China Normal University is located in Guangzhou City, Guangdong Province, and is a cross-provincial enrollment. Its enrollment plan for the History Category in Jilin Province accounts for a small proportion (about 17 students), with no significant changes in recent years, so the influence of regional preference factors is limited.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward shift trend of rankings from 2021 to 2025 (cumulative backward shift of about 487 positions in 2024-2025), the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the slight decrease in the number of History Category candidates in Jilin Province (slightly easing competition), the stable reputation of the university, and the differentiated wait-and-see popularity of normal majors, it is expected that the minimum ranking for the History Category in 2026 will continue to shift slightly backward from the 2025 ranking of 1769. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1789, with a range of 1700 to 1890.

If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<1700), focus on reaching for Tier 1 normal majors.
